barRaise.topFinding: The application is still clean: this is the fourteenth consecutive daily review with zero application-code findings, and the 06-21 canonical audit reads fully aligned at v0.18.4 across every counted asset (199 herbs, 75 illustrations, 11 symbols, 16 textures, 24 rune meanings, four-step botanical resolution). The verdict moved to stalled, one notch past the 06-20 at-risk, for one reason the verdict-picker names directly: the last bar-raise was at-risk and nothing has changed since. HEAD is still 3d9b480, the same commit it has been since 2026-06-14 (now seven days frozen). The 864 MB .git, the four-spelling work-queue footprint, the uncommitted PROJECT_SPEC.md edit, and the stale .git/index.lock are byte-for-byte the same artifacts the 06-20 report listed. Every open action closes by a decision, not a code change, and the central one (cut v1.0, mark 'Symbol + label polish' done, drop Apothecary to weekly review) is now on its ninth consecutive review unactioned. Stalled is the honest read and the point of changing the verdict is to stop the daily reprint loop and force the decision.

actions.title: Cut v1.0, mark "Symbol + label polish" done, and drop Apothecary to weekly (constellation-only) review. Ninth review carrying this; second flagged HIGH.
Decide and close the 864 MB `.git` bloat: `git filter-repo --strip-blobs-bigger-than 5M` + force-push, or a "Won't fix" locked decision in PROJECT_SPEC section 8.

Normalize the apothecary queue to one project ID (`yaa`) with a `prompt` field, close the shipped `yaa-commit-release-automsg-2026-06-12`, and clear the YaE-side mirror-stale-tree item. (Orchestration side; read-only here.)
